# Copilot Instructions

This project's canonical context is in [`CLAUDE.md`](../CLAUDE.md). Read it first.

It covers:
- What this project does and its architecture
- How to run tests, lint, and typecheck
- Conventions and review focus areas

**Continuity policy:** Project guidance is authored in `CLAUDE.md` only. `AGENTS.md`, `GEMINI.md`, and `.github/copilot-instructions.md` (this file) are short pointers that route each tool to the same source of truth. When updating project guidance, edit `CLAUDE.md`; do not duplicate content here.
